subject: Fermi  trigger No 686403226: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB221002.48 (trigger No 686403226,19h 29m 19.20s , +08d 55m 48.0s, R=6.19) errorbox  23561 sec after notice time and 23597 sec after trigger time at 2022-10-02 18:06:58 UT, with upper limit up to  17.9 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 42 deg. The sun  altitude  is -18.7 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -5 deg., longitude l = 46 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2107700

We obtain a following upper limits.
